metadata.title: AI-Powered Apps | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered platform for all your business operations — from voice transcription and AI fields to intelligent assistants, email templates, and instant business insights.

hero.title: Your apps.
hero.description: Adon Artificial Intelligence turns your everyday data into smarter decisions, faster workflows, and better results.

automationSection.title: Automate
automationSection.titleHighlight: the work that slows you down

agentsSection.title: Agents
agentsSection.description: Set up your AI assistant, define tasks, configure permissions, and let it work inside your apps.

steps.title: Create your agent
steps.description: Define role, tools, access, and what this assistant can do.

steps.title: Configure it
steps.description: Train it with documents, workflow rules, and business data.

steps.title: Get tailored responses
steps.description: Get tailored responses from your AI assistant.

compliance.title: Compliance Assistant
compliance.message: I found the required policy, summarized the risk, and prepared a reply for approval.

generated.title: AI generated answer
generated.message: Based on your company rules, this customer request can be accepted with a manager validation.

nextMoveSection.title: Let AI drive the
nextMoveSection.description: From everyday manual work to smart business recommendations, AI can suggest actions, summarize records, and move work forward.
nextMoveSection.useCaseSubtitle: Prep a quote for a big client

insightsSection.title: Instant
insightsSection.description: Ask your data what matters. AI turns business questions into instant reporting and visual analytics.

organizationSection.title: Next-level organization.
organizationSection.subtitle: Next-level organization
organizationSection.description: Documents, tasks, emails, and records become searchable, organized, and easier to act on with AI.

features.title: Voice Transcription
features.description: Effortlessly record, transcribe, summarize, and organize conversations.

features.title: AI fields
features.description: Create summaries, tags, and smart labels from text records instantly.

features.title: AI chatter assistant
features.description: Chat with AI inside Adon, preparing replies, summaries, and next steps.

features.title: Email template
features.description: Transform AI-written drafts into professional emails in seconds.

features.title: Web page content
features.description: Generate website copy, product descriptions, and marketing text.

features.title: Livechat
features.description: Answer website visitors faster with AI-assisted responses.
